darkMode: Auto dark mode uses :root:not([data-theme]) and prefers-color-scheme: dark. Setting any data-theme value on <html> disables auto dark mode, so custom themes won't have dark styles applied over them.

units-container.description: Grid wrapper with max-width 1200px, auto-centered with padding.

units-row.description: Flex row container for grid units. Uses flex-flow: row wrap.

unit-100.description: Grid unit — flex-basis: 100%. Collapses to 100% on tablet breakpoint.

unit-auto.description: Grid unit — flex-grow: 1, fills remaining space.

centered.description: Center a unit with margin: 0 auto.

unit-centered.description: Alias for centered. Center a unit with margin: 0 auto.

reverse-direction.description: Reverse row direction (flex-direction: row-reverse). Applied to units-row.

right-to-left.description: Alias for reverse-direction. Reverse row direction.

split.description: Remove gutters from child units. Applied to units-row.

centered-content.description: Center content within row (justify-content: center; text-align: center). Applied to units-row.

stacked.description: Remove bottom margin from row. Applied to units-row.

btn.description: Base button class. Inline-block, centered text, default dark background.

btn-outline.description: Outlined button variant. Transparent background with border.

btn-lg.description: Alias for btn-big. Large button size.

btn-sm.description: Alias for btn-small. Small button size.

btn-xs.description: Alias for btn-smaller. Extra small button size.

btn-active.description: Active/pressed state. Muted background with inset shadow.

btn-disabled.description: Disabled state. Muted colors, default cursor.

btn-square.description: Alias for btn-straight. Remove border-radius from button.

btn-group.description: Button group container. Flex row that joins buttons together.

btn-single.description: Single button container with flex layout.

form.description: Form wrapper class. Enables styled inputs with full width, border-radius, and consistent padding.

form-inline.description: Inline form layout. Labels and inputs display inline-block.

form-inline-list.description: Inline form list layout with spacing between items.

form-list.description: List-style form layout with vertical spacing between items.

form-desc.description: Form description/help text. Small, muted color.

input-error.description: Error state for inputs. Red border with red box-shadow.

input-success.description: Success state for inputs. Green border with green box-shadow.

input-gray.description: Gray/neutral state for inputs. Gray border with gray box-shadow.

input-lg.description: Alias for input-big. Large input size.

input-sm.description: Alias for input-small. Small input size.

input-xs.description: Alias for input-smaller. Extra small input size.

input-search.description: Rounded search input with pill-shaped border-radius.

input-on-black.description: Input styled for dark backgrounds. Semi-transparent white background.

input-groups.description: Input group container. Flex layout for prepend/append addons.

input-prepend.description: Prepended addon for input groups. Displays before the input.

input-append.description: Appended addon for input groups. Displays after the input.

btn-append.description: Button appended to an input group.

select-outlined.description: Outlined select variant. Transparent background with visible border.

navbar.description: Horizontal navigation bar with bottom border. Contains ul > li > a structure.

navbar-centered.description: Center-align navbar items (justify-content: center). Legacy alias: navbar--centered.

navbar-left.description: Left-align navbar items (justify-content: flex-start). Legacy alias: navbar--left.

navbar-right.description: Right-align navbar items (justify-content: flex-end). Legacy alias: navbar--right.

navbar-vertical.description: Vertical navbar layout with left border instead of bottom border. Legacy alias: navbar--vertical.

navbar-thick.description: Bold 2px bottom border on navbar. Legacy alias: navbar--thick.

navbar-borderless.description: No border on navbar. Active items use background highlight instead. Legacy alias: navbar--borderless.

navbar-border-blue.description: Blue bottom border on navbar. Legacy alias: navbar--border-blue.

navbar-border-green.description: Green bottom border on navbar. Legacy alias: navbar--border-green.

navbar-border-red.description: Red bottom border on navbar. Legacy alias: navbar--border-red.

navbar-border-yellow.description: Yellow bottom border on navbar. Legacy alias: navbar--border-yellow.

navbar-stack.description: On mobile, wrap navbar items instead of horizontal scrolling. Legacy alias: navbar--stack.

navbar-pills.description: Pill-style navigation. Horizontal flex layout with hover backgrounds.

nav-stacked.description: Vertical stacked navigation with background and bottom borders.

nav-tabs.description: Tab navigation with bottom border. Active tab has border-bottom highlight.

nav-stats.description: Navigation with stats/badges. Positions badges absolutely to the right.

breadcrumbs.description: Breadcrumb navigation with slash separators between items.

breadcrumbs-path.description: Breadcrumb path-style variant. Modifier on breadcrumbs with spaced slashes.

pagination.description: Pagination controls. Floated list items with hover and active states.

active.description: Active state for navigation items. Applied to li elements within navs.

navigation-toggle.description: Mobile menu toggle button with hamburger icon.

navigation-fixed.description: Fixed positioning for navigation. position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: 101.

tools-alert.description: Base alert component. Flex layout with left border accent, supports dark mode.

alert.description: Alias for tools-alert. Base alert component.

tools-alert-blue.description: Blue/info alert variant. Blue tinted background with blue left border.

alert-blue.description: Alias for tools-alert-blue. Blue/info alert variant.

tools-alert-red.description: Red/error alert variant. Red tinted background with red left border.

alert-red.description: Alias for tools-alert-red. Red/error alert variant.

tools-alert-green.description: Green/success alert variant. Green tinted background with green left border.

alert-green.description: Alias for tools-alert-green. Green/success alert variant.

tools-alert-yellow.description: Yellow/warning alert variant. Yellow tinted background with yellow left border.

alert-yellow.description: Alias for tools-alert-yellow. Yellow/warning alert variant.

tools-alert-black.description: Black/neutral alert variant. Gray background with dark left border.

alert-black.description: Alias for tools-alert-black. Black/neutral alert variant.

tools-alert-outline.description: Outlined alert variant. Keeps tinted background, adds full border.

alert-outline.description: Alias for tools-alert-outline. Outlined alert variant.

tools-alert-ghost.description: Ghost alert variant. Transparent background, border only.

alert-ghost.description: Alias for tools-alert-ghost. Ghost/transparent alert variant.

tools-alert-stack.description: Stacked alert layout (flex-direction: column). Use for multi-line alerts with buttons or CTAs.
tools-alert-stack.example:
Message text.

Action

alert-stack.description: Alias for tools-alert-stack. Stacked column layout for alerts.

tools-alert-dismiss.description: Alert dismiss button. Renders multiplication sign, fades on hover.

tools-message.description: Toast message. Hidden by default (display: none), fixed position top-right.

message.description: Alias for tools-message. Toast message hidden by default.

req.description: Marks a form field as required with a visual indicator. Alias: required.

lead.description: Lead paragraph style. Larger font size with relaxed line-height.

lead-subhead.description: Lead subhead style. Same as lead — larger font size with relaxed line-height.

h1.description: Apply h1 heading styles to any element.

h2.description: Apply h2 heading styles to any element.

h3.description: Apply h3 heading styles to any element.

h4.description: Apply h4 heading styles to any element.

h5.description: Apply h5 heading styles to any element.

h6.description: Apply h6 heading styles to any element. Bold, uppercase.

margin.description: Add default margin on all sides.

margin-xs.description: Add extra-small margin on all sides (0.25rem).

margin-sm.description: Add small margin on all sides (0.5rem).

margin-lg.description: Add large margin on all sides (1.5rem).

margin-xl.description: Add extra-large margin on all sides (2rem).

margin-top-extra.description: Add double margin-top. Legacy alias: margin-top--extra.

margin-bottom-extra.description: Add double margin-bottom. Legacy alias: margin-bottom--extra.

margin-left-extra.description: Add double margin-left. Legacy alias: margin-left--extra.

margin-right-extra.description: Add double margin-right. Legacy alias: margin-right--extra.

padding.description: Add default padding on all sides.

padding-xs.description: Add extra-small padding on all sides (0.25rem).

padding-sm.description: Add small padding on all sides (0.5rem).

padding-lg.description: Add large padding on all sides (1.5rem).

padding-xl.description: Add extra-large padding on all sides (2rem).

padding-top-extra.description: Add double padding-top. Legacy alias: padding-top--extra.

padding-bottom-extra.description: Add double padding-bottom. Legacy alias: padding-bottom--extra.

padding-left-extra.description: Add double padding-left. Legacy alias: padding-left--extra.

padding-right-extra.description: Add double padding-right. Legacy alias: padding-right--extra.

border.description: Add 1px solid border on all sides.

sr-only.description: Visually hidden but accessible to screen readers.

skip-link.description: Skip navigation link — hidden until focused. Use as the first focusable element inside <body>.

hide-on-desktop.description: Hidden on desktop, visible on mobile (display: block below 767px).

text-tertiary.description: Muted/tertiary text color (theme-aware). Maps to --ply-color-muted. Alias: text-muted.

text-muted.description: Muted/tertiary text color (theme-aware). Alias for text-tertiary.

success.description: Green text color for success states.

error.description: Red text color for error states.

no-orphan.description: Prevents orphaned words at the end of text blocks using text-wrap: pretty.

text-balance.description: Balances line lengths for headings using text-wrap: balance.

no-link-style.description: Suppresses link color and underline on all <a> tags inside the container. Useful for card-style links.

bg-glass.description: Transparent background with backdrop blur. Theme-aware: white tint in light mode, dark tint in dark mode. Customizable via --ply-bg-glass.

equal-height.description: On units-row: makes all unit children stretch to the same height. Their direct children automatically fill the available height.
equal-height.example:
Short
Taller content here

background-white.description: Set background to surface color (white in light mode).

table-bordered.description: Add borders to all table cells. Applied to table element.

table-simple.description: Remove borders and left padding from table. Applied to table element.

table-flat.description: Remove borders and all padding from table. Applied to table element.

table-stroked.description: Only bottom borders on table cells. Applied to table element.

table-stripped.description: Striped table rows (odd rows get background color). Applied to table element.

table-hovered.description: Highlight table rows on hover. Applied to table element.

table-container.description: Responsive table wrapper with overflow: auto and custom scrollbar.

btn-ghost.description: Ghost button. Transparent background, no border. Shows subtle background on hover. For icon-only or low-emphasis actions.

btn-icon.description: Icon-only button modifier. Equal padding on all sides for a square aspect ratio. Combine with btn-ghost for toolbar-style icon buttons.

fill-width.description: Stretch buttons to fill full width inside btn-group.

rounded.description: Round the outer corners of a btn-group.

unit-role-right.description: Float a grid unit to the right.

unit-role-left.description: Clear left float on a grid unit.

fill-height.description: Set display: flex on a unit so children can stretch to fill height.

code.description: Inline code styling. Prefer the native <code> element instead.

layer-1.description: Background layer 1 with subtle box-shadow. Uses --ply-bg-surface.

layer-2.description: Background layer 2 with medium box-shadow. Uses --ply-bg-surface-alt.

layer-3.description: Background layer 3 with large box-shadow. Uses --ply-bg-muted.

bg-blue.description: Blue background color. Theme-aware, WCAG AA with white text.

bg-red.description: Red background color. Theme-aware, WCAG AA with white text.

bg-green.description: Green background color. Theme-aware, WCAG AA with white text.

bg-yellow.description: Yellow background color. Theme-aware, WCAG AA with dark text.

bg-surface.description: Surface background color. Theme-aware. Alias: background-white.

bg-black.description: Alias for background-black. Set background to black.

bg-white.description: Alias for background-white. Set background to surface color (white in light mode).

text-on-color.description: White text for use on colored backgrounds.

fully-centered.description: Flex center on both axes with text-align center.

vertically-centered-space-between.description: Vertical center with space-between horizontal distribution.

block-first.description: Clear float for first block in a new row.

accordion-title.description: Accordion item header. Clickable to toggle panel visibility.

accordion-panel.description: Accordion content panel. Hidden by default, shown when title is opened.

accordion-toggle.description: Toggle indicator element inside accordion title.

autocomplete.description: Autocomplete dropdown container for form inputs.

dropdown.description: Positioned absolute dropdown panel. Appears below trigger element.

label.description: Inline label/tag. Small, uppercase, bold text with background color.

label-outline.description: Outlined label variant with border instead of background fill.

badge.description: Rounded pill badge for counts or status indicators.

modal-blur.description: Apply blur effect to background content behind a modal.

modal-box.description: Modal viewport container. Fixed position, full-screen overlay.

modal.description: Modal dialog box. Centered content panel with background and shadow.

modal-close.description: Modal close button. Positioned in top-right corner.

tooltip.description: Tooltip popup. Positioned element for contextual information.

flexible-embed.description: 16:9 responsive embed container for videos and iframes.

filterbox.description: Filterable input wrapper with dropdown list.

typeahead-results.description: Results dropdown for typeahead. Alias: livesearch-results.

tools-droparea.description: Drag-and-drop file upload area with dashed border.

tools-droparea-placeholder.description: Placeholder text inside drag-and-drop upload area.

navigation-toggle-solid.description: Solid background variant of the mobile navigation toggle button.

table-stroked.description: Table with bottom borders only on cells.

table-container.description: Responsive scrollable wrapper for tables. Adds horizontal scroll on overflow.

typography.--ply-font-body: Font family for body text and form controls. Default: system font stack (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, etc.).
typography.--ply-font-heading: Font family for headings (h1-h6). Default: inherits from --ply-font-body.
typography.--ply-font-mono: Font family for code, pre, kbd, samp elements. Default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace.

background.--ply-bg-glass: Frosted glass overlay. backdrop-filter: blur(8px). Light: rgba(255,255,255,0.15), Dark: rgba(38,38,38,0.25)

text.--ply-color-text-inverse: Inverse text (for colored backgrounds). Light: #fff, Dark: #fff

interactive.--ply-color-focus: Focus ring color. #0f62fe in both themes

buttons.--ply-btn-default-color: Default button text color. Light: inherits --ply-color-text-inverse (#fff), Dark: #f4f4f4

navigation.--ply-nav-hover: Nav item hover bg. Light: #f4f4f4, Dark: #333333
navigation.--ply-nav-active-color: Active nav item text. Light: #161616, Dark: #ffffff

elevation.--ply-layer-0: Base layer bg. Same as bg-body
elevation.--ply-shadow-1: Subtle shadow. Light: rgba(0,0,0,0.08), Dark: rgba(0,0,0,0.2)
elevation.--ply-shadow-2: Medium shadow. Light: rgba(0,0,0,0.1), Dark: rgba(0,0,0,0.3)
elevation.--ply-shadow-3: Heavy shadow. Light: rgba(0,0,0,0.12), Dark: rgba(0,0,0,0.4)

dialog.styling: border: none, border-radius: 0.25rem, padding: 1.5rem, max-width: 32rem, box-shadow, theme-aware background. ::backdrop overlay included.
dialog.tip: Use native <dialog> with .showModal() instead of custom overlays. Add bg-glass class for frosted effect.

details.styling: Border, border-radius, padding. Summary gets cursor: pointer, font-weight: 600. Rotation arrow on open state.
details.tip: Use for collapsible content. No classes needed — just <details><summary>Title</summary>Content</details>.

table.styling: Full width, border-collapse, themed borders on th/td, bold thead. Caption gets uppercase muted styling.
table.tip: Just write a <table>. Add table-bordered, table-striped, or table-hover classes for variants.

nav.styling: ul list-style: none, margin: 0. Add .navbar for horizontal nav bar.
nav.tip: Wrap <ul> in <nav class='navbar'> for a styled navigation bar.

blockquote.styling: Italic, larger font, left padding with 2px left border. <small> and <cite> get muted color.
blockquote.tip: Just use <blockquote>. Add <small> or <cite> for attribution.

code.styling: Monospace font, 90% size, inline padding, theme-aware background and border.
code.tip: Inline: <code>. Block: <pre><code>. ply resets pre>code padding so it doesn't double up.

kbd.styling: Black background, white text, monospace, no-wrap.

progress.styling: Full width, 0.5rem height, themed background, border-radius. WebKit and Firefox vendor prefixes.
progress.tip: Native <progress value='70' max='100'></progress>. No classes needed.

meter.styling: Full width, 0.5rem height, themed background, border-radius.

hr.tip: Just <hr>. Adapts to light/dark theme automatically.

headings.styling: h1-h6 get themed color, font-family, responsive sizing, margin-bottom: 0.5rem.
headings.tip: Use semantic headings. Responsive sizing is automatic across breakpoints.

form-controls.styling: Inputs, textareas, selects get themed borders, backgrounds, focus states (blue border + shadow). Wrap in .form for full styling.
form-controls.tip: Wrap form in <div class='form'> to enable ply's input styling. Labels become block-level with pointer cursor.
